author: design-phase-1c-events-md-055e
content:
Result: Implemented vitreous_events crate with all types, propagation, and hit testing. 25 tests pass covering all 10 acceptance criteria. Zero external dependencies. Clippy and fmt clean.

Files implemented:
- types.rs: MouseEvent, KeyEvent, ScrollEvent, DropEvent, DropData, Modifiers, MouseButton, Key (40+ variants), KeyCode (70+ variants), CursorIcon (24 variants), DragConfig stub, EventHandlers (14 handler slots), geometry primitives (Point, Rect, Corners, NodeId, LayoutNode)
- propagation.rs: PropagationContext with stop_propagation(), EventTree trait, bubble_event() and dispatch_keyboard_event() dispatchers
- hit_test.rs: hit_test() with reverse paint order walk and rounded-corner-aware point-in-rect math
- lib.rs: Re-exports all public types
